# TraceContext.HasTracestate method

Returns `true` when *meta* carries a W3C-conformant `tracestate`. Mirrors TS `hasTracestate`. (R-15.4.1-b)

```csharp
public static bool HasTracestate(JsonObject meta)
```

| parameter | description |

| meta | The `_meta` object. |

## Return Value

`true` when a valid `tracestate` is present.
